arts.ttl: Luis Palma's dad admits Celtic transfer exit possibility as he slams social media rumours
arts.sum: Luis Palma's dad admits the Celtic star could be on his way out of Parkhead in January - but insists his son will keep fighting for his future. Get the latest news sent straight to your messages by joining our Celtic WhatsApp community today.

arts.ttl: How the Aberdeen camp are feeling with top-of-the-table clash against champions Celtic looming
arts.sum: Celtic fans will be excited for the international break to end as the Bhoys prepare for their top-of-the-table clash with Aberdeen on Saturday, October 19th. While confidence is flowing around the Hoops’ chances of another victory, the Dons will arrive with priorities of their own after the international break concludes and hype for the clash kicks up a notch.

arts.ttl: Arne Engels finds out how wild these parts are as he is target of Celtic nonsense from knee jerkers | Parkhead analysis
arts.sum: The Belgian playmaker might have gone off the boil in the last couple of games but fans are too quick to race into judgement

arts.ttl: Chris Sutton sends pointed Celtic reminder to Tottenham Hotspur about Ange Postecoglou
arts.sum: The defeat means that Spurs lost the chance to record six straight wins for the first time since 2018 and it seems to have reaped renewed pressure on the former Celtic boss as more scrutiny is poured on Postecoglou’s playing style. And if the Spurs fans think that the defeat to Brighton is going to change that, then they will need to think again, according to former Celtic hero, Chris Sutton .

arts.ttl: Luis Palma sees truth out as Celtic star's camp go public and his dad sends urgent message to supporters
arts.sum: The 24-year-old has been reduced to a bit-part player and speculation surrounding his future is fervent in Honduras

arts.ttl: Three players that can show Brendan Rodgers their Celtic credentials over the international break
arts.sum: Starting off, Auston Trusty could have an important international break ahead of him as he bids to win a permanent slot in the Celtic line-up. With Cameron Carter-Vickers out injured, the United States international has slotted in alongside Liam Scales, albeit in a right-sided role, despite being naturally left-footed and more comfortable on that side.

arts.ttl: What Kasper Schmeichel said to Ronan Hale before he took Ross County's penalty vs Celtic
arts.sum: Ronan Hale has shared what Kasper Schmeichel did to try and distract him just before he scored his penalty in Ross County’s defeat to Celtic on Sunday. However, the win wasn’t without any drama after Kasper Schmeichel saved Hale’s first penalty attempt but the spot kick was ordered to be retaken after the Celtic ‘keeper moved off his goal line early.

arts.ttl: How to watch Celtic vs Twente: TV, live stream and kick off details for historic women’s Champions League clash
arts.sum: It's a huge night of European football for Elena Sadiku and her team

arts.ttl: Inside Kasper Schmeichel's Celtic penalty mind games as Ronan Hale reveals what was said
arts.sum: Ronan Hale admits he was relieved to overcome Kasper Schmeichel's mind games after lashing home a retaken penalty against his boyhood heroes. Get the latest news sent straight to your messages by joining our Celtic WhatsApp community today.

arts.ttl: Celtic are a cut above Rangers and the rest but Brendan Rodgers guilty of one thing
arts.sum: "The SPFL and the Champions League are completely different ball games and when you’re coming up against a team that are recent finalists, the quality is going to be at a level that you’ve not played against. "Celtic were completely opened up on the night and they were given a hammering by a very talented Dortmund team.
